name: agent-tooling
description: Local marketplace for cross-host agent tooling plugin packages in this repository.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Recursive machine-first code review, application, and full-cycle convergence with mpcr

plugins.name: docker-architect
plugins.description: Generate hardened Dockerfiles, Compose stacks, and container build pipelines

plugins.name: espanso-dynamic-forms
plugins.description: Comprehensive dynamic form patterns for Espanso

plugins.name: excel-foundry
plugins.description: Excel workbook capability router for package, desktop, cloud, automation, semantic-model, and manifest/artifact operations

plugins.name: gitops-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end GitOps workflow governance and automation covering branching, Conventional Commits, PR lifecycle, CI gating, and release management

plugins.name: goalspec
plugins.description: Compile messy intent and project context into bounded, verifiable goal contracts.

plugins.name: project-harness
plugins.description: Detects repo languages, frameworks, task runners, distribution shape, and CI surface, then scaffolds or updates a repo-level harness: justfile, GitHub Actions CI/dist workflows, .gitignore/.gitattributes support files, and local state under .local/harness/

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audit and improve a skill's packaging, triggers, workflow, and verification loop
